creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I cannot reproduce this.  Please point out the line within your 1549 line 
typescript that we should be looking at. 

Can you do a 'pkg_delete /var/db/pkg/vim*', and also manually delete any 
Vim bits you may find on your system.  Then build and install the port again 
( cd /usr/ports/editors/vim ; make clean install ) and see if this still 
happens?
